channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Krebs on Security, The Hacker News, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading

item.title: Cognizant TriZetto breach exposes health data of 3.4 million patients
item.description: TriZetto Provider Solutions, a healthcare IT company that develops software and services used by health insurers and healthcare providers, has suffered a data breach that exposed the sensitive informa...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: North Korean APTs Use AI to Enhance IT Worker Scams
item.description: DPRK worker scams are old hat, but they're still working, thanks to AI tools that help with everything from face swapping to daily emails....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: CISA warns feds to patch iOS flaws exploited in crypto-theft attacks
item.description: CISA ordered U.S. federal agencies to patch three iOS security flaws targeted in cyberespionage and crypto-theft attacks using the Coruna exploit kit. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: EU Auto Rules Shift Gears on Cybersecurity Standards
item.description: The European Union is taking new precautions as climate change and cybersecurity threats rise across the automotive industry....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: EC-Council Expands AI Certification Portfolio to Strengthen U.S. AI Workforce Readiness and Security
item.description: EC-Council, creator of the world-renowned Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH) credential and a global leader in applied cybersecurity education, today launched its Enterprise AI Credential Suite, with four...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Fake Claude Code install guides push infostealers in InstallFix attacks
item.description: Threat actors are employing a new variation of the ClickFix social engineering technique called InstallFix to convince users into running malicious commands under the pretext of installing legitimate ...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Microsoft 365 Backup to add file-level restore for faster recovery
item.description: Microsoft will soon begin rolling out a significant upgrade to Microsoft 365 Backup to speed up recovery by allowing administrators to restore individual files and folders. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Iran's Cyber-Kinetic War Doctrine Takes Shape
item.description: Iran has been hacking IP cameras to plan missile strikes against its enemies, and mounting other attacks on physical assets, showing how cyber and kinetic warfare are fast becoming one in the same....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Cyberattack on Mexico's Gov't Agencies Highlight AI Threat
item.description: Using Anthropic's Claude, OpenAI's ChatGPT, and a detailed playbook prompt, a handful of cyberattackers reportedly gained access to government agencies and its citizens' data....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Ghanain man pleads guilty to role in $100 million fraud ring
item.description: A Ghanaian national pleaded guilty to his role in a massive fraud ring that stole over $100 million from victims across the United States through business email compromise attacks and romance scams. [...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: FBI investigates breach of surveillance and wiretap systems
item.description: The U.S. Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) confirmed on Thursday that it's investigating a breach that affected systems used to manage surveillance and wiretap warrants. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Chinese state hackers target telcos with new malware toolkit
item.description: A China-linked advanced persistent threat actor tracked as UAT-9244 has been targeting telecommunication service providers in South America since 2024, compromising Windows, Linux, and network-edge de...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Bing AI promoted fake OpenClaw GitHub repo pushing info-stealing malware
item.description: Fake OpenClaw installers hosted in GitHub repositories and promoted by Microsoft Bing's AI-enhanced search feature instructed users to run commands that deployed information stealers and proxy malware...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Nation-State Actor Embraces AI Malware Assembly Line
item.description: Pakistan's APT36 threat group has begun using vibe-coding to churn out mediocre malware, but at a scale that could overwhelm defenses....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Tycoon 2FA Goes Boom as Europol, Vendors Bust Phishing Platform
item.description: The phishing-as-a-service platform was popular among cyber threat actors because of its ability to bypass multifactor authentication defenses....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Wikipedia hit by self-propagating JavaScript worm that vandalized pages
item.description: The Wikimedia Foundation suffered a security incident today after a self-propagating JavaScript worm began vandalizing pages and modifying user scripts across multiple wikis. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Cisco Drops 48 New Firewall Vulnerabilities, 2 Critical
item.description: Edge bugs are so fetch, and Cisco just patched 50 new ones, including some heavy hitters with 10 out of 10 scores on the CVSS scale....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: WordPress membership plugin bug exploited to create admin accounts
item.description: Hackers are exploiting a critical vulnerability in the User Registration & Membership plugin, which is installed on more than 60,000 WordPress sites. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: FBI arrests suspect linked to $46M crypto theft from US Marshals
item.description: ​A U.S. government contractor's son, accused of stealing more than $46 million in cryptocurrency from the U.S. Marshals Service, was arrested Wednesday on the island of Saint Martin. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Software Development Practices Help Enterprises Tackle Real-Life Risks
item.description: Organizations can borrow secure-by-design processes to manage non-technical challenges like governance or the inevitable human error....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Google says 90 zero-days were exploited in attacks last year
item.description: Google Threat Intelligence Group (GTIG) tracked 90 zero-day vulnerabilities actively exploited throughout 2025, almost half of them in enterprise software and appliances. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: 2026 Browser Data Reveals Major Enterprise Security Blind Spots
item.description: The browser is becoming the operating system for modern work, yet many enterprises still treat it as an extension of network or endpoint security. Keep Aware's 2026 State of Browser Security Report sh...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: LatAm Now Faces 2x More Cyberattacks Than US
item.description: Much of Central and South America struggles with cybersecurity maturity, and hackers are taking advantage....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Police dismantles online gambling ring exploiting Ukrainian women
item.description: Spanish and Ukrainian law enforcement authorities dismantled a criminal ring that exploited war-displaced Ukrainian women to run an online gambling scheme that laundered nearly €4.75 million in illici...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: VMware Aria Operations Bug Exploited, Cloud Resources at Risk
item.description: Exploitation of the command injection flaw in VMware Aria Operations could grant an attacker broad acess to victims' cloud environments....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Stranger Things Meets Cybersecurity: Lessons from the Hive Mind
item.description: Events and concepts from the Stranger Things television series illustrate how enterprises can defend their networks and stay "right side up."...
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Dark Reading Confidential: This Threat Hunter Helped Cops Bust Up An African Cybercrime Syndicate
item.description: Dark Reading Confidential Episode 15: Interpol relied on Will Thomas and team to help break up a sprawling cybercrime ring, leading to the arrest of 574 suspects, the recovery of more than $3 million,...
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: China's Silver Dragon Razes Governments in EU, SE Asia
item.description: The emerging actor, part of the APT41 nexus, gains initial access via phishing, and uses legitimate network services to obscure cyber espionage activities....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Indian APT 'Sloppy Lemming' Targets Defense, Critical Infrastructure
item.description: India-nexus cyber threat actors are growing more active and sophisticated, using custom tools coded in Rust and cloud-based command and control....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Vehicle Tire Pressure Sensors Enable Silent Tracking
item.description: Like many other features and systems in modern cars, tire pressure sensors leak sensitive data that can be abused by threat actors....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading
